Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $104,028,807Details
International Box Office $103,011,037
Worldwide Box Office $207,039,844
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,581,883
Total $3,581,883
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A prequel to the first two films in the series, mostly set 18 years earlier.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$52,568,183 (50.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 41.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,321 opening theaters/3,329 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $156,895,789

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: October 21st, 2011 (Wide) (Brazil)
January 18th, 2012 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: February 14th, 2012 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for some violence, language, brief sexuality and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2193, 10/12/2011)
Running Time: 81 minutes
Franchise: Paranormal Activity
Cast, crew, or production detail: Found Footage, Prequel, Prologue, Same Role, Multiple Actors
Plot point: Demons, Haunting, Non-Chronological
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Blumhouse, Solana Films, Room 101
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
